channel.title: Debian software on
channel.description: Recent content in Debian software on

item.title: Azure Cli
item.description: Install curl -sL https://packages.microsoft.com/keys/microsoft.asc \ | gpg --dearmor \ | tee /etc/apt/trusted.gpg.d/microsoft.gpg > /dev/null AZ_REPO=$(lsb_release -cs) echo "deb [arch=amd64] https://packages.microsoft.com/repos/azure-cli/ $AZ_REPOmain" \ | tee /etc/apt/sources.list.d/azure-cli.list apt update apt install azure-cli Reference Name Link Installation https://docs.microsoft.com/en-us/cli/azure/install-azure-cli-linux?pivots=apt

item.title: Docker
item.description: Install curl -fsSL https://download.docker.com/linux/debian/gpg \ | apt-key add - add-apt-repository "deb [arch=amd64] https://download.docker.com/linux/debian $(lsb_release -cs)stable" apt update apt install docker-ce usermod -aG docker ${USER} su - ${USER} Disable zfs plugin in /etc/containerd/config.toml disabled_plugins = ["cri", "zfs"] Reference Name Link Installation https://docs.docker.com/engine/install/debian/

item.title: GitHub
item.description: Install apt-key adv --keyserver keyserver.ubuntu.com --recv-key C99B11DEB97541F0 apt-add-repository https://cli.github.com/packages apt update apt install gh Reference Name Link Installation https://github.com/cli/cli/blob/trunk/docs/install_linux.md#debian-ubuntu-linux-apt

item.title: Helm
item.description: Install curl https://baltocdn.com/helm/signing.asc \ | apt-key add - echo "deb https://baltocdn.com/helm/stable/debian/ all main" \ | tee /etc/apt/sources.list.d/helm-stable-debian.list apt-get update apt-get install helm Reference Name Link Installation https://helm.sh/docs/intro/install/#from-apt-debianubuntu

item.title: Kubectl
item.description: Install curl -s https://packages.cloud.google.com/apt/doc/apt-key.gpg \ | apt-key add - echo "deb https://apt.kubernetes.io/ kubernetes-xenial main" \ | tee -a /etc/apt/sources.list.d/kubernetes.list apt-get update apt-get install kubectl Reference Name Link Installation

item.title: Microsoft .net SDK
item.description: Install wget https://packages.microsoft.com/config/debian/10/packages-microsoft-prod.deb \ -O packages-microsoft-prod.deb dpkg -i packages-microsoft-prod.deb rm packages-microsoft-prod.deb apt-get update apt-get install -y dotnet-sdk-3.1 apt-get install -y dotnet-sdk-5.0 Reference Name Link Installation https://docs.microsoft.com/en-us/dotnet/core/install/linux-debian

item.title: Terraform
item.description: Install curl -fsSL https://apt.releases.hashicorp.com/gpg \ | sudo apt-key add - sudo apt-add-repository "deb [arch=$(dpkg --print-architecture)] https://apt.releases.hashicorp.com $(lsb_release -cs)main" apt update apt install terraform Reference Name Link Installation https://www.terraform.io/docs/cli/install/apt.html

item.title: Visual Code
item.description: Install curl -sSL https://packages.microsoft.com/keys/microsoft.asc \ | apt-key add - add-apt-repository "deb [arch=amd64] https://packages.microsoft.com/repos/vscode stable main" apt update apt install code Reference Name Link Installation https://code.visualstudio.com/docs/setup/linux#_debian-and-ubuntu-based-distributions

item.title: Yq
item.description: Install GO111MODULE=on go get github.com/mikefarah/yq/v4 Reference Name Link Installation https://github.com/mikefarah/yq#go-get

item.title: Virtualization
item.description: Bridge configuration /etc/networking/interfaces # This file describes the network interfaces available on your system # and how to activate them. For more information, see interfaces(5). source /etc/network/interfaces.d/* # The loopback network interface auto lo br0 iface lo inet loopback iface enp0s31f6 inet manual iface br0 inet static bridge_ports enp0s31f6 address 10.0.10.100 broadcast 10.0.10.255 netmask 255.255.255.0 gateway 10.0.10.254 bridge_stp off # disable Spanning Tree Protocol bridge_waitport 0 # no delay before a port becomes available bridge_fd 0 # no forwarding delay bridge_ports none # if you do not want to bind to any ports bridge_ports regex eth* # use a regular expression to define ports Enable forwarding Install apt install \ libvirt-daemon \ qemu-kvm \ virt-manager Reference Name Link Installation

item.title: k9s
item.description: Install version='0.24.2' url="https://github.com/derailed/k9s/releases/download/v${version}/k9s_Linux_x86_64.tar.gz" wget $url -O k9s.tar.gz tar -zxvf k9s.tar.gz k9s sudo mv k9s /usr/local/bin rm k9s.tar.gz Reference Name Link Installation https://github.com/derailed/k9s#installation

item.title: Go
item.description: Install version="1.15.6" wget https://golang.org/dl/go${version}.linux-amd64.tar.gz -O go.tar.gz tar -xvf go.tar.gz sudo mv go /usr/local rm go.tar.gz mkdir -p ~/go/bin Add environment variables export GOROOT=/usr/local/go export GOPATH=~/go export PATH=$GOPATH/bin:$GOROOT/bin:$PATH Reference Name Link Installation https://golang.org/doc/install

item.title: zsh
item.description: Install apt install zsh zsh-syntax-highlighting My theme Download https://github.com/saltera/my-zsh-theme/blob/master/my.zsh-theme to $ZSH/custom/themes/my.zsh-theme # vim:ft=zsh ts=2 sw=2 sts=2 # # agnoster's Theme - https://gist.github.com/3712874 # A Powerline-inspired theme for ZSH # # # README # # In order for this theme to render correctly, you will need a # [Powerline-patched font](https://github.com/Lokaltog/powerline-fonts). # Make sure you have a recent version: the code points that Powerline # uses changed in 2012, and older versions will display incorrectly, # in confusing ways.

item.title: Gnome
item.description: Appearance Change the theme to Adwaita-dark gsettings set org.gnome.desktop.interface gtk-theme "Adwaita-dark" Install Shell Extensions Install the gnome-shell-extensions package. apt update apt install gnome-shell-extensions Activate packages on https://extensions.gnome.org No top left hot corner Sound output device chooser Todo txt Additional Shortcuts Navigation Action Key Hide all normal windows Super + D

item.title: Packages
item.description: Install from main apt update apt install \ apt-transport-https \ backintime-common \ bridge-utils \ ca-certificates \ curl \ dnsutils \ gimp \ git \ gnupg \ gnupg2 \ gstreamer1.0-libav \ gstreamer1.0-plugins-ugly \ gstreamer1.0-vaapi \ htop \ hwinfo \ inkscape \ libavcodec-extra \ lsb-release \ mc \ openssh-server \ pavucontrol \ software-properties-common \ tasksh \ taskwarrior \ tree \ yq Install from contrib apt install \ intel-microcode Install from non-free apt install \ rar \ unrar Remove games apt-get purge \ aisleriot\ atomix\ five-or-more\ four-in-a-row\ gnome-2048\ gnome-chess\ gnome-klotski\ gnome-mahjongg\ gnome-mines\ gnome-nibbles\ gnome-robots\ gnome-sudoku\ gnome-taquin\ gnome-tetravex \ hitori\ iagno\ lightsoff\ quadrapassel\ swell-foop\ tali apt-get autoremove Manually installed Compare the current packages to those that were initially installed.
